ModMetaData.name: Overlord
ModMetaData.author: BroTeamPill
ModMetaData.description:
Twitch viewers control your colonists through their browser. Assign a colonist to a viewer and they get a live control panel with skills, needs, health, map view, and full pawn commands. Self-hosted relay, mobile-first UI, narrow Harmony patch surface.
Puppeteer replacement for RimWorld 1.5/1.6.
